prestazioni: LS3 (L99) 6.2L V8 engine: Replace stock camshaft with a custom grind from **Harrop Engineering** featuring 236°/242° duration, 0.620" lift, and 114° LSA for optimized high-RPM power (targeting 550+ RWHP on E85 with stock internals). Pair with **Harrop HTV2300 supercharger** (10psi base boost) and **ID1000x injectors** for fueling.

Drivetrain: Swap stock 6L80E transmission for a **Tremec TR-6060** (from ZL1 Camaro) with **Spec Stage 4+ twin-disc clutch** and **HSV-spec 3.73:1 LSD differential** (rear) from the W1 Maloo. Upgrade driveshaft to **Mark Williams carbon-fiber unit** with CV-style yokes.

Suspension/Handling: **Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers** (HSV-specific valving) with **SuperPro poly bushings** (full chassis refresh) and **HSV Clubsport R8-spec front sway bar (27mm solid)**. Braking upgraded to **AP Racing CP8660 6-piston calipers** (front) with **DBA 5000 Series rotors** and **Hawk HT-10 pads** for endurance track use.
estetica: **Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit** (HSV Senator-specific, 50mm wider front/70mm rear) with **custom carbon-fiber overfenders** (hand-laid by **Carbon Revolution**). Front splitter and rear diffuser from **Vorsteiner V-FF102** (modified for HSV bumper contours).

Wheels: **Rotiform LAS-R 19x10.5" (ET25) front / 19x12" (ET45) rear** in matte bronze, wrapped in **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R** (275/35/19 front, 315/30/19 rear). Fender flares rolled and pulled by **K-Mac** for clearance.

Aero/Details: **HSV GTS-R-style carbon-fiber bonnet** (with functional heat extractors) from **Seibon**, paired with **HSV Senator Signature Series LED taillights** (clear lens, smoked reflectors). Full **PPG 'Holden Racing Team' Erebuni Blue** respray with **3M Matte Clear Coat** for UV protection.
